name: dealflow
description: An IB-grade prospecting engine for deal makers: pull contacts from your own list or a connected data provider, qualify for real fit, research each company, assemble comparable-deal comp books, and draft on-voice outreach — every send human-approved. Pluggable sources, interchangeable value strategies, sector intelligence, and A/B split-testing.

interface.shortDescription: Research, comps, and on-voice outreach for deal makers.
interface.longDescription: An IB-grade prospecting engine: bring your own contact list (or connect a data provider), and the skill qualifies each prospect for real fit, researches the company, assembles a comparable-deal comp book, picks a value strategy, and drafts outreach in your voice — queued for your approval. Includes pluggable prospect sources, interchangeable strategies, sector packs, and A/B split-testing so you learn what converts.
defaultPrompt: Set up my deal-maker prospecting toolkit.
Work my dormant list and draft re-engagement outreach.
Build a comparable-deals comp book for this prospect.
